title: hebe monticola
intro: Hebe monticola, also known as the Alpine Hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Hebe monticola have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Hebe monticola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its health benefits, which include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
